title: Dendry Mod Studio preview channel notice

titleLocalized.en: Dendry Mod Studio preview channel notice
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: Dendry Mod Studio 預覽版公告

body: The preview announcement channel is active. This build includes Quick Start, the Starter Demo template, guided Review & Apply, and desktop runtime previews.

bodyLocalized.en: The preview announcement channel is active. This build includes Quick Start, the Starter Demo template, guided Review & Apply, and desktop runtime previews.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: 預覽版公告通道已啟用。這個版本包含快速開始、內建 Demo 模板、引導式審查與套用，以及桌面版 runtime preview。
